Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine and significant proteinuria with high microalbumin/creatinine ratio, indicating possible renal dysfunction or nephropathy. Low glucose and HbA1c suggest hypoglycemia or possible lab artifact. Urine is abnormal (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, bilirubin present, ketonuria), supporting renal and/or hepatic involvement. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying metabolic or systemic disease.
